name: Grupo Bafar, S.A.B. de C.V.
summary: Grupo Bafar, S.A.B. de C.V. produces, distributes, and sells food products in Mexico and internationally. It offers turkey, pork, and mixed hams; beef and pork cuts; sausages and mortadelas; boneless, nuggets, and breaded chicken; and sliced and minced beef products. In addition, it operates stores under the BIF, Carnemart, and La Pastora brand names. Further, the company acquires, develops, and leases real estate properties; and cultivates corns and walnuts. Additionally, it offers microcredit and business loans for commercial, agricultural, and livestock sectors. Grupo Bafar, S.A.B. de C.V. was founded in 1983 and is based in Chihuahua, Mexico.
